raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joabs Zerujas Dehls
bija pahr to Katra-Spehku/ un
Josawats Akiuda Dehls bija
Kanzleris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Zadaks Akitoba Dehls/
un Abimeleks Abjatara Dehls
biia Preesteri/ un Sausus bija
Skrihweris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Benajus Jojada
Dehls bija pahr teem Kreeti un
Pleetti/ un Dahwida Behrni bi-
ja tee pirnajee pee ta Rehnina
Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XX. Nodalla.
Dahwida Issfhtiti : 2. Tohp no to Ammo-
niteru Rehnina apsmeeti : 4. Tee Sihreri un
Ammoniteri tohp no Dahwida diwireist kan-
ti : 6/ 14/ 16/ 18.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N pehz to nomirre
Nakas / to Ammona
Behrnu Rehninsch/ un
winna Dehls tavpe par Rehnt-
an winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Dahwids: Es
darrischu Schehlastibu pee Ano-
na Nakasa Dehla/ jo winna
Tehws irr man dauds labbu dar-
rijs. Un Dahwids fuhtija Weh-
stus winna eepreezinaht pahr
winna Tehwu. Tad nahze Dah-
wida Kalpi us to Ammonitern
Behrnu Semmi pee Anona /
winna eepreezinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Ammonitern Behr-
nu Leeli-Kungi fazztja us Ano-
nu: Woj Dahwids eezeeni tawu
Tehwu preekich tawahm Azzin/
ka tas Wehstus pee tew fuhtijs?
neggi winna Kalpi par to irr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme Anons Dah-
wida Kalpus/ un nodfinne teem
tohs Mattus/ un nogreese win-
keem weenu Drehbju Pufti lihds
Gurneim/ un atlaide tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee tad gabje/ un dewe
Dahwidain zaur Wihreem Sin-
nu/ tad fuhtija winch teem pret-
ti/ (jo tee Wihri bija fohti ap-
smeeti/) un tas Rehninsch likke
teem fazziht: Paleezeet Jeriku-
fä/ teekams jnhfu Bahrdn atkaß
buhs ataugusi/ tad nahzeet at-
pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu tee Ammona Behr-
ni redseja/ ka tee pee Dahwida
fmirdotchus darrijuschees / tad
fuhtija Anons un Ammona
Behrni/ tuhkstoschus Sudrabu
Talentus/ Rattus un Jahtnee-
kus faderrecht no Mesopotami-
jas/ no Maekas un no Jobas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee faderreja few trihs-
detmits un diwi tuhkstoschus
Rattus/ un to Rehninu no Ma-
ekas/ un winna Laudis/ un tee
nahze un apmette Lehgert prett
Medbn. Un Ammona Behrni
tapulzejahs arridsan no faweem
Pilstahteem/ un nahze Karra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Dahwids to dsir-
deja/ tad fuhtija winch Joabu
un wisfu Spehku ar teem War-
reneein.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ammona Behrni/ kas
isgahjuschi bija/ istaisija tohs
Karra Pulkus preekich Pilsfahta
Wahr-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
